title: International Peace Coalition #120 -  Have We Stepped Beyond the Rule of Law?
description:
Friday September 19, 11am ET/5pm CET

RSVP to join the discussion on Zoom: https://schillerinstitute.nationbuilder.com/ipc_meeting
In response to recent world events, we call upon you and your organizations to join the International Peace Coalition in a vital discussion. Please send reports and initiatives for the agenda ASAP.

Friends of the International Peace Coalition,

What are your plans for lunch this Friday?

In Gaza City, the announced plan over the next 48 hours is for genocide against its 1 million inhabitants. Reuters reported on Sept. 17: "The Israeli military said on Wednesday it was opening an additional route for 48 hours that Palestinians could use to leave Gaza City…. In leaflets dropped over Gaza City, the military said Palestinians could use the newly reopened Salah al-Din Road to escape toward the south and that they had until lunchtime on Friday to do so."

Some are attempting to flee Gaza. But the vast majority will not be able to do so. They will predictably perish before the advancing land and aerial assault by the Israel Defense Forces, which is designed to raze Gaza to the ground. High-rise apartment buildings are already being blown up and demolished, in a macabre reminder of Sept. 11 in New York City.

"If the whole world and its institutions—including the UN—are unable to stop this public horror," Schiller Institute founder Helga Zepp-LaRouche warned today, "then we have stepped into a new era—and it is not a pretty one." Zepp-LaRouche told her weekly webcast audience: "We are in mortal danger of a civilizational collapse. It is not inevitable, but action must be taken to stop it."

International law is being rapidly deconstructed, leaving nothing but the law of the jungle. In addition to the 2 million Gazans who are the direct victims of ongoing genocide, Mankind itself is being subjected to mass brainwashing: "See? You can’t stop this. You are nothing but beasts, so you may as well learn to live (and die) by the law of the jungle."

The same project, in different garb, is underway against Constitutional law in the United States and other nations. The public execution of political figure Charlie Kirk before a horrified audience of 3,000, largely youth, has opened up the Pandora’s box of calls for violent retribution on both sides of the political spectrum, as well as demands that so-called "hate speech"—i.e., freedom of expression—be prosecuted as a crime.

Both developments—the Gaza genocide and Kirk’s murder—are part of a broader international Strategy of Tension being waged by the London-based financial elite, an oligarchical force which is prepared to do anything—anything—to stop the world from adopting an alternative to their bankrupt system. They are guided by decades of evil research by the likes of William Sargent, Kurt Lewin and Eric Trist at London’s Tavistock Institute into the ways in which terror and chaos can be intentionally used to make people more suggestible and malleable to policies they otherwise would reject out of hand.

Some have adequately described the "What" of this Strategy of Tension: "It is a political policy that encourages violent struggle to create a climate of fear and insecurity, leading the public to seek security in a strong national-security state. It involves deployment of state or non-state actors to promote violence and chaos to manipulate public perception and political outcomes," according to one Wikipedia entry.

Others have reported on the "How" or the mechanics of such operations. For example, Russian FSB expert Lt. Col. (ret.) Andrey Popov told Sputnik that Kirk’s assassin "wasn’t necessarily a pro, and may have been an ordinary American with firearms experience groomed and manipulated into becoming a willing killer, either by partisan media or even security services.… U.S. security agencies are known to run an entire cohort of informal ‘agents,’ identified ahead of time, led on, controlled and given the chance to carry out their crime, after which they are liquidated or allowed to disappear."

Lyndon LaRouche and Helga Zepp-LaRouche have provided an answer to the question that few even bother to ask about the Strategy of Tension: "Why?" What is the intention of the policy? Only asking and answering that question provides hope of a solution to the descent into the abyss.

....

How, then, do we defeat the Strategy of Tension? First of all, by changing the subject back to the central issue facing Mankind: replacing the evil, bankrupt Wall Street and City of London system with one worthy of Man’s dignity. And then make sure that we rally the nations of the West to join with the New Paradigm that is already taking shape among the nations of the Global Majority.
